items.title: Bringing up Kartik Sharma, with a little 'duty of care' from Dhoni and Fleming

items.title: 76ers stun Boston to complete series comeback
items.summary: Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey inspire the Philadelphia 76ers to victory in their series decider against the Boston Celtics.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
